a.style: font-family:'Playfair Display', Georgia, 'Times New Roman', 'Liberation Serif', serif

text.tspan: Income share of the richest 1%: World Inequality Database vs. World
The share of income received by the richest 1% of the population, according to two different sources. Data from World Inequality
Database refers to income measured after taxes and benefits. Depending on the country and year, World Bank data relates to
income measured after taxes and benefits or consumption.
Share according to the World Bank
Share according to the World Inequality Database
Data source: World Inequality Database (WID.world) (2024); World Bank Poverty and Inequality Platform (2024)
